title: DocumentStyle
description: The style of the document, influencing the look of the document and any defaults for new content.

defaultHeaderId.description: The ID of the default header.

defaultFooterId.description: The ID of the default footer.

evenPageHeaderId.description: The ID of the header used for even pages.

evenPageFooterId.description: The ID of the footer used for even pages.

firstPageHeaderId.description: The ID of the header used for the first page.

firstPageFooterId.description: The ID of the footer used for the first page.

useFirstPageHeaderFooter.description: Whether to use the first page header/footer IDs for the first page of the document.

useEvenPageHeaderFooter.description: Whether to use the even page header/footer IDs for even pages.

pageNumberStart.description: The page number from which to start counting the number of pages.

useCustomHeaderFooterMargins.description: Whether to use custom header/footer margins.

flipPageOrientation.description: Whether to flip the orientation of the page to landscape, which effectively swaps the width and height of the page size.
